name: Christy Smith
subject: Your body. Your choice.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | Peter,

Mike Garcia went on TV and made it clear: He cannot represent California women in Congress.

When asked his position on the fundamental right to choose, Garcia showed that he's an anti-choice extremist who would insert himself in decisions that should be made between patients and their doctors.

**Reproductive choice is on the ballot in our special election. And I will defend your right to make your own health care decisions every day in Congress.**

**[But to get there, I need your help. Will you pitch in $5 or more to help me defeat anti-choice extremist Mike Garcia?](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b82b/29776869/af959f1/569f9385/204678870/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDAzMTBfY2hvaWNlLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2003_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200310_choice-full")**

In 2020, there should be zero question that the decision of if and when we have children should belong to people who can get pregnant, not politicians.

But Mike Garcia -- like his hero Donald Trump -- wants to take that fundamental choice away.

I'm proud to have the endorsement of pro-choice groups like EMILY's List and NARAL. Throughout my life, I've fought to tear down barriers facing women, and in Congress, I'm resolutely committed to ensuring that every person in this country has complete control of their own body and health care decisions.

**[If you want a representative who will fight for one of your most basic rights, please chip in $5 or whatever you can to my campaign.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b82b/29776869/af959f1/569f9385/204678870/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDAzMTBfY2hvaWNlLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2003_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200310_choice-full")**

Thanks,

\-- Christy [DONATE](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b82b/29776869/af959f1/569f9385/204678870/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDAzMTBfY2hvaWNlLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2003_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200310_choice-full") |
---|---|---

777 S. Figueroa Street, Suite 4050, Los Angeles, CA 90017-5864.

name: staff@maggiehassan.com
subject: flipping Montana's Senate seat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hi there: Montana's Democratic Governor, Steve Bullock just announced that he's running for Senate.
This is HUGE -- Democrats need to net just four seats to win back the majority, and Steve getting in the race could really help our odds.
Senator Hassan committed to helping Steve raise $10,000 yesterday to kick off his campaign and unfortunately we didn't quite get there. His opponent has a huge fundraising head start so closing the gap is super important.
[**We checked -- it looks like you haven't had a chance to chip in yet. Will you please rush $3 or whatever you can to help Steve flip Montana's Senate seat and win back the majority from Mitch McConnell?**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc491/2a380d31/22486b2c/f08d99/3186547096/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0YnVsbG9jayIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMjAwMzEwX01XSDRCdWxsb2NrM19uYSIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4bullock?refcode=e20200310_MWH4Bullock3_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: I'm proud that Giffords PAC has endorsed John. Help us elect him this year by making a donation today!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
|
#
Friends -- I'm writing to you from Colorado, where I endorsed John Hickenlooper for U.S. Senate. He is a proven champion on gun safety and we must help elect him in 2020. After the devastating shooting in Aurora, John passed safer gun laws as governor. His right-wing opponent, Cory Gardner, failed to show the same leadership. There is so much at stake this year: we need to flip the Senate and we have to defeat the NRA's #1 ally -- Donald Trump. That's why we need people like John if we want to see our gun laws change -- not someone who follows in lockstep with Trump's dangerous policies. I'm doing everything I can to help elect gun safety champions like John. I hope you'll join me during this critical moment. **Will you make a donation to John 's Senate campaign today? We need leaders like him fighting for us in Congress if we want to end the epidemic of gun violence in this country:** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-200310-trump?refcode=em-200310-giffords-full&amount=10&express_lane=true&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
---

---
[CHIP IN $100 NOW](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-200310-trump?refcode=em-200310-giffords-full&amount=100&express_lane=true&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
---
| [CHIP IN $250 NOW](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-200310-trump?refcode=em-200310-giffords-full&amount=250&express_lane=true&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
---
[ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-200310-trump?refcode=em-200310-giffords-full&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
---
Every year that passes, we see more and more candidates stepping up to run for office with gun safety as one of their leading issues.
2020 is no different. John is a tireless ally in the fight to make our communities safe from gun violence and we must do everything we can to help him win his race. I was humbled to be back in Colorado meeting with advocates and survivors -- from Columbine and Aurora, of daily gun violence. Thank you to each person who shared their story.
I know John will keep carrying them with him in the fight for safer gun laws.
My very best,
Gabby Giffords
_John and I sat with survivors and activists at a roundtable to discuss how gun violence has impacted Colorado 's communities._
__
_The butterfly pavilion in Westminster, Colorado presented a butterfly release in honor of victims and survivors of gun violence. It was beautiful!_
__
_We were joined by hundreds of supporters and survivors in Aurora for a rally and panel discussion. There is energy and momentum behind this movement -- I know we can end gun violence._

Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
---
P.O. Box 18886, Denver, CO 80218

name: Terry Neese
subject: BREAKING NEWS: We’re in trouble.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Neese for Congress [Unsubscribe](http://sendy
body:
|
---
Friend, As the Democrat primary election results are tallied tonight, I want to speak with you for just a moment about the trouble our country faces. Many in the media are cheering as the liberal establishment marches lock-step behind Joe Biden. **But here 's the reality! Joe Biden is as much of a radical liberal as Bernie Sanders.** As vice president, Biden was instrumental in passing Obamacare, pushed tax hikes, and made reckless spending an even bigger problem in Washington. Even this morning, Joe Biden told a voter they were "full of it" after he was called out for supporting gun control. **No matter if it 's Joe Biden or Bernie Sanders, our country is in trouble if we lose this fall. We can't let this happen, Friend.** **[](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/kQuDPoZT0892iF1HpSDpzb1g/C6lk8OgcUyKSVj1g1k8s1g/AkNhYnbe892zWAahp763OfPEsQ)** [**If we 're going to Keep America Great, we need to act today. Can you chip in $10 and help me support President Trump's agenda?**](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/kQuDPoZT0892iF1HpSDpzb1g/C6lk8OgcUyKSVj1g1k8s1g/AkNhYnbe892zWAahp763OfPEsQ) We can't win in November without your support, friend. | | | Friend, Thank you for your interest in attending the 2020 Seventh District Convention (April 25th) on behalf of Team Ramirez! _As a reminder, the**only** way to vote for me as your Republican nominee is to register and attend the convention._ If you have not already _filled out and signed_ a county-specific form, _you are not yet registered to attend_. Please join us at one of our delegate dinners or drop-off locations on the schedule below so we can get you fully registered for the convention. If you have any questions, I would love to hear from you - just respond to this email or call Cindy Horne (804-384-3674) anytime. Thank you! _I truly appreciate everything you're doing to help us take back the Seventh District_. \-- Tina _**March 10th**_ Chesterfield Drop Location

name: Team Hagerty
subject: #TeamHagerty Thanks President Trump
body:
No images? Click here https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-e-nhliuo-fuutjhhtj-o/

March 10, 2020

#TeamHagerty Stands With Middle Tennessee Tornado Victims

There is still work to be done to support the families impacted by the devastating tornadoes in Middle Tennessee last week. Tennesseans are resilient and together, will rebuild and come out of this disaster stronger than before.

To find out how to volunteer with disaster relief efforts, email the Putnam County Sheriff's Office HERE. [mailto:helpnow@putnamcounty.gov]

To donate to the American Red Cross Disaster Relief click HERE. [https://www.redcross.org/donate/donation.html/]

President Trump In Tennessee

#TeamHagerty is thankful to President Donald Trump for coming to Tennessee to see the tornadoes' devastation firsthand. The president has taken swift and decisive action to help Middle Tennessee rebuild. Families that have been impacted by these horrific storms are in our thoughts and prayers. Together, we are Tennessee strong.

Photo cred: Tennessean [https://www.tennessean.com/story/news/politics/2020/03/09/coronavirus-impact-tennessee-bottom-line/4952385002/]

RELEASED: "Bill's Blueprint To Protect Our Constitution"

Our Constitution is under threat from the Democratic socialists running for President and their like-minded counterparts in Washington, D.C. Today, Bill released "Bill's Blueprint To Protect Our Constitution," highlighting his plan to protect against the radical liberals, who want to impeach Supreme Court justices, pack the federal bench with liberal activist judges, limit our religious freedoms, and much more. To read the plan click HERE.

#TeamHagerty In The News

Mayor Dean Dickey: [https://www.columbiadailyherald.com/opinion/20200208/letter-to-editor-why-former-mayor-dean-dickey-supports-bill-hagerty] [https://www.columbiadailyherald.com/opinion/20200208/letter-to-editor-why-former-mayor-dean-dickey-supports-bill-hagerty] Why former Mayor Dean Dickey supports Bill Hagerty [https://www.columbiadailyherald.com/opinion/20200208/letter-to-editor-why-former-mayor-dean-dickey-supports-bill-hagerty]

In Tennessee, Bill Hagerty is the only U.S. Senate candidate that has been endorsed by President Trump. As President Trump’s former Ambassador to Japan, I know that Bill is ready to hit the ground running on Day 1 to stand with the President to fight back against the Democrats’ radical liberal agenda. He is not afraid to stand up to Nancy Pelosi, “The Squad” and RINOs like Mitt Romney. President Trump backs Bill Hagerty, and so do I.

Jeff Broyles: Hagerty fights for conservatives [https://www.johnsoncitypress.com/Letter-to-the-Editor/2020/02/14/Letters-It-s-election-season.html]

Bill’s broad range of experience both in business and government make him the best qualified for the job, period. He is a family man who not only displays the Christian conservative values we expect by those representing us but truly lives them in daily life. He genuinely cares about Tennesseans and is fully equipped to go to battle in Washington in our defense. After looking him in the eye, I can fully vouch for the fact that he is a pro-life, Second Amendment custodian in full support of our president’s agenda. Without hesitation, I intend to support and vote for him and humbly ask that you do as well.

Kenneth Eaton: [http://www.williamsonherald.com/opinion/letter-to-the-editor-as-us-senator-hagerty-would-fight/article_fe312fd4-3884-11ea-9b19-c37ec864af64.html] Hagerty As US senator, Hagerty would fight socialist agenda [http://www.williamsonherald.com/opinion/letter-to-the-editor-as-us-senator-hagerty-would-fight/article_fe312fd4-3884-11ea-9b19-c37ec864af64.html]

As the commissioner of the Tennessee Department of Economic and Community Development under Gov. Bill Haslam, Hagerty worked with companies such as Nissan and Bridgestone to help bring hundreds of jobs to Tennessee. As our state’s next U.S. senator, I know he will support bills that will benefit Tennessee’s booming economy. He will fight for lower taxes and vote against socialists, whose expensive plans will hurt Tennesseans tremendously. According to the Tennessee Department of Labor & Workforce Development, unemployment was 3.9% in 2019 — a record low in the state. Let’s keep this record going with Bill Hagerty representing us in the United States senate. He has already proven he is the man for the job.

Be a Part of #TeamHagerty TELL US WHY YOU SUPPORT BILL HAGERTY [https://teamhagerty.ivolunteers.com/Surveys/tell-us-why] DONATE TO THE CAMPAIGN [https://secure.winred.com/teamhagerty/eoq-november?utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=EOM%20Nov%202] VOLUNTEER WITH #TEAMHAGERTY [https://teamhagerty.ivolunteers.com/Register/Registration] Press Highlights

Tennessean: [https://www.tennessean.com/story/news/politics/2020/03/09/coronavirus-impact-tennessee-bottom-line/4952385002/] Capitol Notebook: How will coronavirus impact Tennessee's bottom line?

Buffalo River Review: [https://teamhagerty.com/buffalo-river-review-senate-candidate-hagerty-made-perry-county-stop/] Senate Candidate Hagerty Made Perry County Stop

Elizabethton Star: [https://www.elizabethton.com/2020/02/24/hagerty-visits-with-carter-county-republican-party/] Hagerty visits with Carter County Republican Party

What They're Saying...

"I know that Bill Hagerty will work with President Trump, just as he did while Ambassador to Japan, to protect our farmers and make sure that they are treated fairly when it comes to trade. He has my support to be Tennessee’s next Senator."

-Mayor Rick Graham [https://www.williamsonhomepage.com/opinion/letter-to-the-editor-bloomberg-s-comments-on-farmers-insulting/article_80d5c59e-5b3f-11ea-a467-f7cdc0bb2990.html]

"Bill Hagerty is running for the United States Senate to combat the radical socialists and their agenda. I know Bill will stand with President Donald Trump to protect my conservative values and the conservative values of so many Tennesseans across the state."

-Michael Tedder [https://www.roanecounty.com/content/support-hagerty%E2%80%99s-us-senate-bid]

"I know that Bill Hagerty is a good quality Republican. He knows the value of conservative judges and is going to fight to support President Donald Trump. The President and I will continue to come back and support Bill Hagerty."

-Nikki Haley [https://twitter.com/TeamHagerty/status/1229833970914938881]

"That’s why it’s very important that we send a senator to Washington, D.C., who understands how dangerous this is and who will stop the Democrats’ extremely liberal agenda. I believe that representative is Bill Hagerty, a fiscal conservative running for the United States Senate who is endorsed by President Trump."

-Kenneth Eaton [https://teamhagerty.com/letter-to-the-editor-as-us-senator-hagerty-would-fight-socialist-agenda/]

"I am supporting Bill Hagerty for Senate because he will continue fighting for family-owned farms, like mine, to ensure we have the resources necessary to compete on a global scale and win."

-Charlotte Kelley [https://teamhagerty.com/covington-leader-kelley-just-like-president-trump-bill-hagerty-will-deliver-on-his-promises-for-tennesseans/]

"Tennessee loving Bill Hagerty, who was my Tennessee Victory Chair and is now the very outstanding Ambassador to Japan, will be running for the U.S. Senate. He is strong on crime, borders & our 2nd A. Loves our Military & our Vets. Has my Complete & Total Endorsement!"

-President Donald Trump [https://twitter.com/realDonaldTrump/status/1149779387077791749]

Team Hagerty

P.O. Box 150748

Nashville, TN 37215 Like https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-fb-nhliuo-fuutjhhtj-b/ Tweet https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-tw-nhliuo-fuutjhhtj-n/ Forward https://hfs.forwardtomyfriend.com/t-fuutjhhtj-76178D70-nhliuo-l-p Preferences https://hfs.updatemyprofile.com/t-nhliuo-76178D70-fuutjhhtj-x | Unsubscribe https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-u-nhliuo-fuutjhhtj-ju/

subject: I'll Be Completely Honest With You
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Kennedy for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15961790/169046077/-1907457918?refcode=03042020_em_hdr&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjEwOWJjZS1hMjYzLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lFBxod-h8Vkx-btoYaMjIAbkrO20HIBajleC2E8iuBo=)
---
Dear Friend, I'll be honest with you - I'm having a hard time wrapping my head around Angele Merkel's statement that 60-70% of the German population will be infected. If that were to be true, it could translate into almost a quarter million fatalities in Germany alone. Merkel is not prone to sensationalism, and I know we face a significant public health challenge, but I'm having a hard time accepting it \- is it really __that bad__? Even if it's only 10% as bad as that, it still requires a fact-based and focused response. The administration's current focus on fiscal stimulus is off target. We need to focus on universal testing to detect cases and control the spread. We need to prepare our hospitals and health care professionals for a potentially large influx of patients. We also need to close the gaping holes in our health care system that this virus will surely exploit. We need to assure the ~30 million Americans who don't have health insurance that they can get tested and treated regardless of their ability to pay. We also need to provide assistance to those without paid sick leave to encourage them to stay out of the workplace if they're sick. Once we've got the virus under control, we can focus on the economic recovery. It feels very odd to me to make a fundraising ask in this environment. But if we're going to build a better America, the need to raise the resources to run a competitive campaign grows more important every day. We're approaching the 1/3 mark of our goal of raising $50,000 by the end of March. **[I humbly ask that you chip in what you can](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15961791/169046078/-1907457918?refcode=03042020_em_line&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjEwOWJjZS1hMjYzLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lFBxod-h8Vkx-btoYaMjIAbkrO20HIBajleC2E8iuBo=). ** | [$10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15961792/169046079/1282640063?refcode=03112020_em_button&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjEwOWJjZS1hMjYzLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lFBxod-h8Vkx-btoYaMjIAbkrO20HIBajleC2E8iuBo=) | [$25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15961793/169046080/1282640063?refcode=03112020_em_button&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjEwOWJjZS1hMjYzLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lFBxod-h8Vkx-btoYaMjIAbkrO20HIBajleC2E8iuBo=) | [$50](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15961794/169046081/1282640063?refcode=03112020_em_button&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjEwOWJjZS1hMjYzLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lFBxod-h8Vkx-btoYaMjIAbkrO20HIBajleC2E8iuBo=)

clean_body: | = Dear Friend, I'll be honest with you - I'm having a hard time wrapping my head around Angele Merkel's statement that 60-70% of the German population will be infected. If that were to be true, it could translate into almost a quarter million fatalities in Germany alone. Merkel is not prone to sensationalism, and I know we face a significant public health challenge, but I'm having a hard time accepting it \- is it really that bad? Even if it's only 10% as bad as that, it still requires a fact-based and focused response. The administration's current focus on fiscal stimulus is off target. We need to focus on universal testing to detect cases and control the spread. We need to prepare our hospitals and health care professionals for a potentially large influx of patients. We also need to close the gaping holes in our health care system that this virus will surely exploit. We need to assure the ~30 million Americans who don't have health insurance that they can get tested and treated regardless of their ability to pay. We also need to provide assistance to those without paid sick leave to encourage them to stay out of the workplace if they're sick. Once we've got the virus under control, we can focus on the economic recovery. It feels very odd to me to make a fundraising ask in this environment. But if we're going to build a better America, the need to raise the resources to run a competitive campaign grows more important every day. We're approaching the 1/3 mark of our goal of raising $50,000 by the end of March. =. | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Thank you, Rick | Paid for by Rick Kennedy for Congress Rick Kennedy for Congress 2203 Emmett Pkwy Austin, TX 78726 To unsubscribe, please .

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bobby=20Schilling?=
subject: Let's Win This Thing!
body:
The Des Moines Register released more results from its Iowa Poll on Tuesday, and the results are encouraging for Republicans. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/bobbyforiowa.com/lets-win-this-thing?e=90fad69796)
---
| |
---
|
---
| |
# **_Let's Win This Thing!_**
The Des Moines Register released more [results from its Iowa Poll on Tuesday](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=52154b3a36&e=90fad69796), and the results are encouraging for Republicans. In each of Iowa’s four congressional districts, voters were asked if they plan to vote for the Republican candidate or the Democrat candidate this fall for U.S. Representative. In all four districts, more voters said they plan to vote for the Republican congressional candidate. Here is how each district broke down. 1st Congressional District: 49% Republican, 46% Democrat 2nd Congressional District: 49% Republican, 41% Democrat 3rd Congressional District: 43% Republican, 42% Democrat 4th Congressional District: 51% Republican, 40% Democrat And look at that! Besides the 4th Congressional District, which has a huge Republican registered voter advantage, it’s Iowa’s 2nd Congressional District that appears to be the most primed district to send a Republican to Congress! I’m sure the results made the reporters in the newsroom do a double take, but this is exactly what I’ve been experiencing on the campaign trail all spring. And let me add one more thing, I don’t get the sense that people in the 2nd District just want to send any Republican to Washington D.C., they want to send an authentic conservative who relates to the hard-working people in this District. While the poll didn’t mention any of the congressional candidates by name, there is some other information that we can deduct from the results. The poll shows a significant gender gap with 52 percent of women voters preferring the Democrat candidates for Congress, while 58 percent of men support the Republican in the race. What has made me a successful candidate for Congress in the past is my ability to relate to voters. I don’t have some fancy degree, hell I only made it through one semester at a community college. What I do have are experiences in being a union steward, an insurance agent, and a small businessman. With President Donald Trump at the top of the ticket this fall, a blue-collar guy like me will naturally appeal to those Trump voters. Look, we can really do this! Stand with me in this fight. I won’t ever let you down, I know I can win in November. Donate today, whether it's $5, $10, or $15 bucks, or a larger contribution like $50, $100, or $250, it will all help me get my message out to people in the district who have longed to have a proud conservative congressional candidate they can be proud to support on the ballot with President Donald Trump this fall. Link to Register Poll: https://www.desmoinesregister.com/story/news/politics/iowa-poll/2020/03/11/iowans-lean-toward-republicans-congress-election-2020-iowa-poll/4978477002/

For Iowa,

\- Bobby Schilling
---

clean_body: The Des Moines Register released more results from its Iowa Poll on Tuesday, and the results are encouraging for Republicans. | | | | | | | | Let's Win This Thing! The Des Moines Register released more , and the results are encouraging for Republicans. In each of Iowa’s four congressional districts, voters were asked if they plan to vote for the Republican candidate or the Democrat candidate this fall for U.S. Representative. In all four districts, more voters said they plan to vote for the Republican congressional candidate. Here is how each district broke down. 1st Congressional District: 49% Republican, 46% Democrat 2nd Congressional District: 49% Republican, 41% Democrat 3rd Congressional District: 43% Republican, 42% Democrat 4th Congressional District: 51% Republican, 40% Democrat And look at that! Besides the 4th Congressional District, which has a huge Republican registered voter advantage, it’s Iowa’s 2nd Congressional District that appears to be the most primed district to send a Republican to Congress! I’m sure the results made the reporters in the newsroom do a double take, but this is exactly what I’ve been experiencing on the campaign trail all spring. And let me add one more thing, I don’t get the sense that people in the 2nd District just want to send any Republican to Washington D.C., they want to send an authentic conservative who relates to the hard-working people in this District. While the poll didn’t mention any of the congressional candidates by name, there is some other information that we can deduct from the results. The poll shows a significant gender gap with 52 percent of women voters preferring the Democrat candidates for Congress, while 58 percent of men support the Republican in the race. What has made me a successful candidate for Congress in the past is my ability to relate to voters. I don’t have some fancy degree, hell I only made it through one semester at a community college. What I do have are experiences in being a union steward, an insurance agent, and a small businessman. With President Donald Trump at the top of the ticket this fall, a blue-collar guy like me will naturally appeal to those Trump voters. Look, we can really do this! Stand with me in this fight. I won’t ever let you down, I know I can win in November. Donate today, whether it's $5, $10, or $15 bucks, or a larger contribution like $50, $100, or $250, it will all help me get my message out to people in the district who have longed to have a proud conservative congressional candidate they can be proud to support on the ballot with President Donald Trump this fall. Link to Register Poll: For Iowa, \- Bobby Schilling | "Donate Now ›" | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2020 Bobby for Iowa, All rights reserved.

**There's a reason that Roll Call has rated Kendra Horn as the most vulnerable incumbent in the House of Representatives.**

They know that when you're bankrolled by liberal elitists, you're not in line with Oklahoma's values.

**Kendra Horn has been bought and paid for by Mike Bloomberg** , the extremist Democrat that just attempted a failed run for President.

**Bloomberg and Horn’s views consist of** :
* Strict gun control
* Open borders
* Amnesty for illegal aliens
* Wreckless government spending

This is who we have representing us in Oklahoma’s 5th District. **A radical liberal Democrat**.

When I get to Washington, I’m going to fight for Oklahoma, not become part of the D.C. insiders club. We need someone who will push for **strong border security, protect the Second Amendment, and restore healthcare freedom** by restricting government control over your medical decisions.

Will you chip in and help us bring Oklahoma values back to Washington?

clean_body: Together, we can fight back | | | | | | | | Peter, Oklahoma is under attack from the Radical Left. There's a reason that Roll Call has rated Kendra Horn as the most vulnerable incumbent in the House of Representatives. They know that when you're bankrolled by liberal elitists, you're not in line with Oklahoma's values. Kendra Horn has been bought and paid for by Mike Bloomberg , the extremist Democrat that just attempted a failed run for President. Bloomberg and Horn’s views consist of : Strict gun control Open borders Amnesty for illegal aliens Wreckless government spending This is who we have representing us in Oklahoma’s 5th District. A radical liberal Democrat. When I get to Washington, I’m going to fight for Oklahoma, not become part of the D.C. insiders club. We need someone who will push for strong border security, protect the Second Amendment, and restore healthcare freedom by restricting government control over your medical decisions. Will you chip in and help us bring Oklahoma values back to Washington? | "DONATE $25" | "DONATE $50" | "DONATE $100" | "DONATE $250" | "DONATE $500" | Kendra Horn's views are out of touch with Oklahoma and they’re out of touch with the United States Constitution. Let's send a true conservative fighter to Washington D.C. Best, \--Janet Barresi | | | | | | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | Copyright © 2020 Janet for Congress, All rights reserved.

body:
It’s almost 14 weeks until the election, and one of our self-funding opponents is already going up on TV with an ad. In fact, he is spending nearly $100,000 this week alone on TV advertising. | | | [
](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/GwE/ni0YAA/t.2zz/Ri5ttPLqTqCJIzRUXwsqMQ/h0/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNKOC-2BNTsNN-2F5eB-2BnnGHBgCN7hPFZaG9aqmo0Sc6zhRfxawiN3ud80qHI90UzgFUfCZI1lGeH2jOUJZ8CPcMS3N8Qn4qP57cfZiJqC1FJ6EcCAYsBrnvxg8zvFVhR8Js2t3TU-2BIEadJqPQjauPGLXbDFRM4-2FIKOKXIF77HAVqlXdk04lB8QqKy72Rxu8w1qJdpZnCRb6Tv3R-2FEnQXqhm7Vhc9-2BmiafngMsUXiN8RfI1aDA-3D-3D/rT_3) Friend, **** **** **** It’s almost 14 weeks until the election, and one of our self-funding opponents is already going up on TV with an ad. In fact, he is spending **_nearly $100,000 this week alone on TV advertising._**
This is exactly what’s wrong with our broken system. The ultra-rich can pour money into their campaigns in an attempt to saturate the airwaves and buy elections. We can’t let that happen.
We need your help. We need to show the strength of our grassroots fundraising so we can compete with opponents who are able to spend millions of their own money on this race. **__****_[Can you make a donation today to make sure our message doesn’t get drowned out?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/GwE/ni0YAA/t.2zz/Ri5ttPLqTqCJIzRUXwsqMQ/h1/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNKOC-2BNTsNN-2F5eB-2BnnGHBgCN7hPFZaG9aqmo0Sc6zhRfxR2yrRVAlW-2BOq9326p3a3gM76BWN2dMev-2BLO4ggFDMzG1-2BXVILzR8kgfh2zk2trwxqwA-2F2kCjl5pnTnqdVstnhEE7IvhoWxlqAOdBGN0zK4ZjFpBj01ktxQ2QKmC1-2Burhh6JNrHFL96q0QjNjrOgtY73EzGdp4OyhJDB6HXdg3YdlJL-2BHuJ2dQOa1w61OKsUTA-3D-3D/t2Gj)_**

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: Biden is full of it
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-LvIT-bp9fiD1B86rrxrdhs1edJc3pXXdnXjwh4qE1mUPtg4uMTkT3cveynr-SxrcHuS3UeEMsfVViejkoDz9I6C0VM4jvwv6VOvV_XZy-9jZQKjdbmbpieMYIJko86L8sNP2GujOxU-GjgE75wxfnVPIs0oV1u49RZ4O-w5ca8=&c=bPgbvbPEbqEDItIW_KqOMNdFlSVQ3M4tzaOARHlbRU8WCb0V4CppTg==&ch=GsyBeA6mxiwywpIBrv9YKMD9une2LHRrWMSUqvnnVBF-2c4-Dppbhg==)
---
| Patriot,
Joe Biden is the one that's full of it. On Tuesday, he was confronted by union construction workers in Michigan on his stance on the 2nd Amendment. When the worker told Biden he was "actively trying to diminish our Second Amendment right to keep and bear arms," Biden loses his temper and replies "YOU'RE FULL OF ****"
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-LvIT-bp9fiD1B86rrxrdhs1edJc3pXXdnXjwh4qE1mUPtg4uMTkT3cveynr-SxrcHuS3UeEMsfVViejkoDz9I6C0VM4jvwv6VOvV_XZy-9jZQKjdbmbpieMYIJko86L8sNP2GujOxU-GjgE75wxfnVPIs0oV1u49RZ4O-w5ca8=&c=bPgbvbPEbqEDItIW_KqOMNdFlSVQ3M4tzaOARHlbRU8WCb0V4CppTg==&ch=GsyBeA6mxiwywpIBrv9YKMD9une2LHRrWMSUqvnnVBF-2c4-Dppbhg==)
---
| [Watch the video](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-LvIT-bp9fiD1B86rrxrdhs1edJc3pXXdnXjwh4qE1mUPtg4uMTkT3cveynr-SxrcHuS3UeEMsfVViejkoDz9I6C0VM4jvwv6VOvV_XZy-9jZQKjdbmbpieMYIJko86L8sNP2GujOxU-GjgE75wxfnVPIs0oV1u49RZ4O-w5ca8=&c=bPgbvbPEbqEDItIW_KqOMNdFlSVQ3M4tzaOARHlbRU8WCb0V4CppTg==&ch=GsyBeA6mxiwywpIBrv9YKMD9une2LHRrWMSUqvnnVBF-2c4-Dppbhg==)
What is stunning is that Biden follows up his outburst by saying that he's going to take away citizens' AR-14s [I assume he means AR-15s. He's often confused].
---
| | | [CHIP-IN NOW TO PROTECT THE SECOND AMENDMENT](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-LvIT-bp9fiD1B86rrxrdhs1edJc3pXXdnXjwh4qE1mUPtg4uMTkT3cveynr-SxrcHuS3UeEMsfVViejkoDz9I6C0VM4jvwv6VOvV_XZy-9jZQKjdbmbpieMYIJko86L8sNP2GujOxU-GjgE75wxfnVPIs0oV1u49RZ4O-w5ca8=&c=bPgbvbPEbqEDItIW_KqOMNdFlSVQ3M4tzaOARHlbRU8WCb0V4CppTg==&ch=GsyBeA6mxiwywpIBrv9YKMD9une2LHRrWMSUqvnnVBF-2c4-Dppbhg==)
---
| Joe Biden has absolutely no respect for voters and no respect for the 2nd Amendment. He shouted obscenities in this man's face and spat lies about his stance on gun rights.
This is the man that the DNC and the mainstream Democrat Party has chosen to lead the country.
We need to step up, as a country, and reject the leadership of Joe Biden. HE WILL TAKE OUR GUNS, LIE ABOUT IT, AND GET AWAY WITH IT WHILE THE MEDIA PROTECTS HIS EVERY MOVE.
I need you to chip in today to help me take on the mainstream Democrat Party while they prop up Joe Biden and try to take away your 2nd Amendment rights.
---
| | | [STAND UP FOR 2A RIGHTS](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-LvIT-bp9fiD1B86rrxrdhs1edJc3pXXdnXjwh4qE1mUPtg4uMTkT3cveynr-SxrcHuS3UeEMsfVViejkoDz9I6C0VM4jvwv6VOvV_XZy-9jZQKjdbmbpieMYIJko86L8sNP2GujOxU-GjgE75wxfnVPIs0oV1u49RZ4O-w5ca8=&c=bPgbvbPEbqEDItIW_KqOMNdFlSVQ3M4tzaOARHlbRU8WCb0V4CppTg==&ch=GsyBeA6mxiwywpIBrv9YKMD9une2LHRrWMSUqvnnVBF-2c4-Dppbhg==)
---
| I will always fight for our constitutional right to keep and bear arms. The Democrat party has officially adopted the policy of gun confiscation, and now more than ever we need to stand up for our rights.
For our rights,

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: ‘An Opportunity for Lawmakers to Work Across the Aisle and Get Something Done’
body:
"A divided Congress in a presidential election year may seem an unlikely setting for the first major drug-pricing reform in decades." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3d86998cbe&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **‘An Opportunity for Lawmakers to Work Across the Aisle and Get Something Done’**

“A divided Congress in a presidential election year may seem an unlikely setting for the first major drug-pricing reform in decades, but over the past year common goals and designs have emerged to set up a rare opportunity,” Joe Grogan, Director of the White House Domestic Policy Council, writes in _The Wall Street Journal_.

“President Trump has made lowering prescription-drug costs a priority and is willing to invest political capital to work with both parties . . . Congress should capitalize on this opportunity and work with the administration to reject special interests, reject partisan posturing, and provide relief to the American people.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b96adf874a&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| Vice President Mike Pence, head of the Administration’s Coronavirus Task Force, announced yesterday that private health insurers have agreed to waive co-pays for Coronavirus testing and treatment. “The vice president said testing will be available at LabCorp and Quest Diagnostic locations and 4 million additional test kits will be sent out by the end of the week,” Fred Lucas reports for [_The Daily Signal_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7bd7a9deb7&e=3ee4985eea) _._
---
|
---
| “Over the past five months, according to the Department of Homeland Security, roughly 14,000 more illegal aliens have been deported or returned than the number that has arrived at the Southwest border. Yes, you read that right — more illegal immigrants are being sent back across the border than are coming into the United States, a sort of ‘reverse surge,’” Jenny Beth Martin writes in [_The Washington Times_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3abe962003&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “President Trump presented the Presidential Medal of Freedom Tuesday to retired four-star Army Gen. Jack Keane at the White House, praising Keane as a ‘courageous warrior’ and a ‘fierce patriot.’” The President said that Gen. Keane is a source of great advice—“a visionary, a brilliant strategist, and an American hero,” Talia Kaplan reports for [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e7402037ab&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f5f019a9cc&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3e9327e4f0&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=4d81426060)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111

clean_body: "A divided Congress in a presidential election year may seem an unlikely setting for the first major drug-pricing reform in decades." | | | | | | | ‘An Opportunity for Lawmakers to Work Across the Aisle and Get Something Done’ “A divided Congress in a presidential election year may seem an unlikely setting for the first major drug-pricing reform in decades, but over the past year common goals and designs have emerged to set up a rare opportunity,” Joe Grogan, Director of the White House Domestic Policy Council, writes in The Wall Street Journal. “President Trump has made lowering prescription-drug costs a priority and is willing to invest political capital to work with both parties . . . Congress should capitalize on this opportunity and work with the administration to reject special interests, reject partisan posturing, and provide relief to the American people.” | | Vice President Mike Pence, head of the Administration’s Coronavirus Task Force, announced yesterday that private health insurers have agreed to waive co-pays for Coronavirus testing and treatment. “The vice president said testing will be available at LabCorp and Quest Diagnostic locations and 4 million additional test kits will be sent out by the end of the week,” Fred Lucas reports for . | | “Over the past five months, according to the Department of Homeland Security, roughly 14,000 more illegal aliens have been deported or returned than the number that has arrived at the Southwest border. Yes, you read that right — more illegal immigrants are being sent back across the border than are coming into the United States, a sort of ‘reverse surge,’” Jenny Beth Martin writes in . | | “President Trump presented the Presidential Medal of Freedom Tuesday to retired four-star Army Gen. Jack Keane at the White House, praising Keane as a ‘courageous warrior’ and a ‘fierce patriot.’” The President said that Gen. Keane is a source of great advice—“a visionary, a brilliant strategist, and an American hero,” Talia Kaplan reports for . | | | | | | The White House 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111

# Support these 4 Pro-Choice Women in 2020.
Illinois women are going to play a vital role in both defending and expanding our House majority in 2020.

There are 4 women running competitive races for Congress against anti-choice, anti-women opponents in Illinois.**Lauren Underwood, Betsy Dirksen Londrigan, Marie Newman, and myself, Dani Brzozowski.**

The Republicans and the anti-choice special interest groups are going to fight us with everything they've got but with _your_ help, we will be victorious in November. You can **chip in today to show your support for all four of us. **

Make your contribution [here](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=0253a43d73&e=140a9b81e7)

Dani Brzozowski

name: =?utf-8?Q?Michael=20Guest?=
subject: Thank You!
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/3e9ad4f72542/thank-you?e=6645c92bcf)
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend,

THANK YOU for the confidence you’ve placed in me to be your Republican nominee for Congress again this year!

Haley and I are humbled and grateful for your support in yesterday’s election. I’ll continue working in Congress and throughout this campaign to serve in a way that makes you proud.

I hope you’ll continue [supporting the campaign](https://michaelguest.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ae3ece7e42a6ae24d22e0094b&id=ea1c7a1f9d&e=6645c92bcf) as we move forward to the general election on November 3.

Thank you, again, from the bottom of my heart, for your dedication, your friendship and your prayers. I’m honored to serve as your Congressman.
Sincerely,
---
|
---
| Michael Guest

[ ](http://links.mariaelvirasalazar.com/u/click?_t=a6858014873940e4ab6d0ae3b994ef92&_m=99f5da7df26c47739987e857093e5b43&_e=AYRp_joRsPnfstEH1kGAHQM0_4TTNOVDybkBLq3Rz3Zky9v4OOdRed7lQ9eyRDr9P-ShUZJ1zp1js7TSLYgGQFf_Jrb30M5TheT7sVU9vB3CK_xxeJef4X5TKzsUeZCSdtKjN8mXbuZxWBXWgZfJjeJPmJDVzP8xM3dFddBPnX_rIkuV5fj5A2MtQesMp03wmWScAQEgoUw8WFocuRFJnydtusu4H4-KU9TAHKffILYEWhglIjaH04FBMeZKzNraFo-dn5mNUF7nv42MY3RC0GI3xWXI6lnzMRaVNqHsGJVenUrVtfg4QgUU5fS9ieS3TvsogT4s8VEL1B8WT-z7CNs1bYIILPrhjMNjB5DjQJCyf5e2mufTsxIhVdBixzZDJQ12XmlntLw229fkrBZmJ57LPEsVQsiVwlrKoV3OicU%3D) | |

**I’m Maria Elvira Salazar and I’m a REPUBLICAN running for Congress.**

They’re not going to call me a racist. **[https://secure.winred.com/salazar/action-1076053/](http://links.mariaelvirasalazar.com/u/click?_t=a6858014873940e4ab6d0ae3b994ef92&_m=99f5da7df26c47739987e857093e5b43&_e=AYRp_joRsPnfstEH1kGAHQM0_4TTNOVDybkBLq3Rz3Zky9v4OOdRed7lQ9eyRDr9P-ShUZJ1zp1js7TSLYgGQFf_Jrb30M5TheT7sVU9vB3CK_xxeJef4X5TKzsUeZCSdtKjN8mXbuZxWBXWgZfJjeJPmJDVzP8xM3dFddBPnX_rIkuV5fj5A2MtQesMp03wmWScAQEgoUw8WFocuRFJnw9yABkyNlsSHWVzPID7BRl7m637B4PS3CSZAoCNcCHs1gOZ_m--2YG6K2KLzjRTZfj_m5Hv1Dlzg7HQoSBvlOIXNPu0cFdEmQCETnActO5i0Zy2Kj68krXTzaMC-srKe_ZM2Xu0RlZ_oU07pQKxDVGN_WoT_5nNhVjW8hkisMYi8PfpBCiGs9jmQkQ3s8y4WCbe_Tgq9Cx0bxhZmwysY-w%3D)**

My parents came to America from Cuba with $5 in their pocket. **They came here to escape Socialism.** Spanish is my first language.

I believe in freedom. _Libre!_ **[https://secure.winred.com/salazar/action-1076053/](http://links.mariaelvirasalazar.com/u/click?_t=a6858014873940e4ab6d0ae3b994ef92&_m=99f5da7df26c47739987e857093e5b43&_e=AYRp_joRsPnfstEH1kGAHQM0_4TTNOVDybkBLq3Rz3Zky9v4OOdRed7lQ9eyRDr9P-ShUZJ1zp1js7TSLYgGQFf_Jrb30M5TheT7sVU9vB3CK_xxeJef4X5TKzsUeZCSdtKjN8mXbuZxWBXWgZfJjeJPmJDVzP8xM3dFddBPnX_rIkuV5fj5A2MtQesMp03wmWScAQEgoUw8WFocuRFJn40Iq6Fvs8HUWQOQ0OpjRg-jkvy1wOQb1lU8NuSWtTzCV8NWydnhTJMabi4oU7arLBdkqARf1Nnb87DEpug_SqhCnHg3HfsqVQYiinU36DlOpPKLIWMGMKepdPJAxI-VPT82HVOKR0U8VW0j90nE4EE6mJVU6n7RHu5jqf2T9Gz6myb5Ys3v4aA7b1AegfO2DcPmoN-ZsM6iVOnJw58Xufs%3D)**

I was the first Spanish language reporter for an American news station. I spent three years reporting from a Central American war zone in El Salvador. **I went toe-to-toe with Fidel Castro in his first interview on American soil, challenging him on Socialism.**

_I’ve seen the face of evil._

I’ve never held political office. I never thought I’d run. **[https://secure.winred.com/salazar/action-1076053/](http://links.mariaelvirasalazar.com/u/click?_t=a6858014873940e4ab6d0ae3b994ef92&_m=99f5da7df26c47739987e857093e5b43&_e=AYRp_joRsPnfstEH1kGAHQM0_4TTNOVDybkBLq3Rz3Zky9v4OOdRed7lQ9eyRDr9P-ShUZJ1zp1js7TSLYgGQFf_Jrb30M5TheT7sVU9vB3CK_xxeJef4X5TKzsUeZCSdtKjN8mXbuZxWBXWgZfJjeJPmJDVzP8xM3dFddBPnX_rIkuV5fj5A2MtQesMp03wmWScAQEgoUw8WFocuRFJn2xW-WlWeYzb-VFAvEWeadYcukbB4adVIwCHRIrhvTSXHenoZWjX_9sQKm7vSYFqVUhcNbUg5W73zqvMc0cbP0bvioVCz_TwnLPhp22AYnNZ6iaxtEOGLuP0cbZt5t_iKxQMkKtlKP5k_aHVGE0Glt_9XGx4BLSJEKKypf72JYAXGjrHS3yCZoQpQT9wu8pL4JtG8wzFtmBqEpTR1-ccsNs%3D)**

**But when I saw Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez trying to bring Socialism to this country to destroy it I had to act.** Because I bring a new voice to the fight. One sorely needed in the Republican Party. _Voz!_

I’m MES. **And I stood up to Castro. I’ll have no problem standing up to AOC.[https://secure.winred.com/salazar/action-1076053/](http://links.mariaelvirasalazar.com/u/click?_t=a6858014873940e4ab6d0ae3b994ef92&_m=99f5da7df26c47739987e857093e5b43&_e=AYRp_joRsPnfstEH1kGAHQM0_4TTNOVDybkBLq3Rz3Zky9v4OOdRed7lQ9eyRDr9P-ShUZJ1zp1js7TSLYgGQFf_Jrb30M5TheT7sVU9vB3CK_xxeJef4X5TKzsUeZCSdtKjN8mXbuZxWBXWgZfJjeJPmJDVzP8xM3dFddBPnX_rIkuV5fj5A2MtQesMp03wmWScAQEgoUw8WFocuRFJn1JwNosq2mgwsF-20dx6qRNRMDRzI8IPsqb3dn9H1ZKcEquyj6milMTx54fJJSFvt-eSwy5VnO882gfr4ytaRx_v9Wp9ORCHnXyqOVqa4CP0X9RU-b7CKhWZOCwXA6dl_xJIK0OIDHLo8QEpmpBAbs0EygLIrobSYH8wrKNYvukI0pIGnfghYNcO_MyMyVRGGk9OcouZtYdw2C7my1Qu0NQ%3D)**

**But I can’t do it without your help.** **[https://secure.winred.com/salazar/action-1076053/](http://links.mariaelvirasalazar.com/u/click?_t=a6858014873940e4ab6d0ae3b994ef92&_m=99f5da7df26c47739987e857093e5b43&_e=AYRp_joRsPnfstEH1kGAHQM0_4TTNOVDybkBLq3Rz3Zky9v4OOdRed7lQ9eyRDr9P-ShUZJ1zp1js7TSLYgGQFf_Jrb30M5TheT7sVU9vB3CK_xxeJef4X5TKzsUeZCSdtKjN8mXbuZxWBXWgZfJjeJPmJDVzP8xM3dFddBPnX_rIkuV5fj5A2MtQesMp03wmWScAQEgoUw8WFocuRFJn7086fBd8LRAp6qQx72IK_gBlljkNF7jON84016jlzFevmHsfQTTETkSwMaHJomAEdEBF7oXeUo3vC03HFltz9rMI90yGbkSaiFirNwYf1nwf0rT3Dk5I15aq7mQZmHoVr6yHT-MKE2vWir5JFoWKYaS-eAixlCBowqOGQ0mwQeX8mVZAprv2yr9166mjegwv6jkfJoD29q1jFYBO2W9I24%3D)**

This is one of the top Congressional races in America. Republicans always held this seat until 2018, when a blue flipped it briefly to Democrats. **And now, a Democrat who served in the Clinton Administration represents us. Her name is Donna Shalala and she holds the socialist values that’ll destroy this country.**

I’ll be your champion. My family survived Socialism. We’ll never let it come here.

_En libertad!_

Maria Elvira Salazar
Florida Republican for Congress

clean_body: I’m Maria Elvira Salazar and I’m a REPUBLICAN running for Congress... | | I’m Maria Elvira Salazar and I’m a REPUBLICAN running for Congress. They’re not going to call me a racist. My parents came to America from Cuba with $5 in their pocket. They came here to escape Socialism. Spanish is my first language. I believe in freedom. Libre! I was the first Spanish language reporter for an American news station. I spent three years reporting from a Central American war zone in El Salvador. I went toe-to-toe with Fidel Castro in his first interview on American soil, challenging him on Socialism. I’ve seen the face of evil. I’ve never held political office. I never thought I’d run. But when I saw Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez trying to bring Socialism to this country to destroy it I had to act. Because I bring a new voice to the fight. One sorely needed in the Republican Party. Voz! I’m MES. And I stood up to Castro. I’ll have no problem standing up to AOC. But I can’t do it without your help. This is one of the top Congressional races in America. Republicans always held this seat until 2018, when a blue flipped it briefly to Democrats. And now, a Democrat who served in the Clinton Administration represents us. Her name is Donna Shalala and she holds the socialist values that’ll destroy this country. I’ll be your champion. My family survived Socialism. We’ll never let it come here. En libertad! Maria Elvira Salazar Florida Republican for Congress | | | Paid for by Salazar for Congress | | 824 S. Milledge Ave, Suite 101, Athens, GA 30605 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

**ERIN CRUZ RELEASES A STATEMENT ABOUT THE CA-36 PRIMARY ELECTION RESULTS**
---
"Several Candidates ran in the 36th Congressional District field, sharing their vision with voters in our region for the future of our Republic. Now the election results are in. We Won! It is time to join together to win the 36th Congressional seat in the United States Congress." " I am humbled and honored to have received a strong outpouring of grass-roots support by voters in the 36th Congressional District, showing conservative values, family values, smart business solutions, common sense, National Security, protecting life, defending our natural rights, common sense, and the fundamentals of the United States Constitution -- they still matter. The voters have spoken. You have spoken -- and we have made the General Election in November. Life, liberty and the pursuit of happiness is where "Quality of Life" meet you at home here in California and for all Americans, no matter our beliefs -- we must stand together for what we all want, united. When I first moved to Palm Springs in 36th District several years ago, being a Native Californian, born and raised, I found "home." The "desert life" is diverse. There are so many different kinds of people in the district -- young and old, yet the region, as vast as it is, it still feels like small-town urban living. The beauty of farms, mountains, desert, golf, vibrant shopping districts, hiking trails, biking, you name it, I knew so many here just want to thrive. Yet there are thousands upon thousands of retirees, veterans, working mothers and fathers, and single folks struggling just to get by. Thrive we will, we need changes and now. Over the next few months we will build in the region bringing together folks so we can see that change happen. I want to thank each and every one of you for your continued support and for voting Erin Cruz for Congress on March 3rd!"
---
Erin Cruz Paid for by Erin Cruz for Congress

| | Well, it's game time. I'll be honest: I was kinda hoping that no Republicans would file against Senator Merkley this year. But that didn't happen. **In fact, Senator Merkley drew FOUR Republican challengers!** The good news? That means that they'll be battling it out before the primary in May--giving us time to build our grassroots team all across Oregon. [**Here's what I need you to do right now: Pitch in to our "We the People" Fund. 100% of your donations will go to grassroots organizing.**](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2eff6/6cd27893/53b63075/1590268d/1028241928/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?refcode=2020-03-11-filing&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100") It doesn't need to be much, but **we need a big show of strength to show Mitch McConnell that we've got Jeff's back** , no matter which of his Republicans wins this primary. In 20 days, I have to file our Q2 report--and I want a big number of grassroots donors in there. **I just checked, and we're at 11,748 grassroots donations so far this year.** [**Will you donate, any amount, to help us get to 12,000?**](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2eff6/6cd27893/53b63075/1590268d/1028241928/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?refcode=2020-03-11-filing&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100") Let's do this thing! name: Team DGA
subject: Checking in
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Governors Association
body:
| | |
---
Hi Team,

Our records show that it's been a while since you opened an email from the DGA. We get that lots of people have full inboxes these days, so we wanted to touch base.

You're a critical part of our team, and these emails are essential to keeping you in the loop. They're how we share opportunities to take action, update you on big races, get your feedback to shape our strategy. And they're how we fund our work to elect Democrats: with grassroots gifts from committed Dems like you. (Our average online gift is just $14.77!)

We want you to be part of this team, in whatever capacity feels right for you. But we don't want to overwhelm you with emails you don't want. So just let us know: **Do you want to keep receiving emails about our work to elect Democrats in every state and stop Trump?**
| | [Yes, stay subscribed](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MTUxMTg3OTcS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTg0MDY5NTA3NgS2&mt=2&rj=MTg0MDY5NTA3NQS2&rt=0)
---
| | [Unsubscribe](https://www.pages02.net/democraticgovernorsassoc/unsubscribe/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=15118797&spUserID=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&spJobID=MTg0MDY5NTA3NgS2&spReportId=MTg0MDY5NTA3NQS2)
---
Your activism, your feedback and your grassroots donations are the backbone of everything we do, so it means a lot to have you on the team. We hope you'll keep working with us to elect Democrats in every corner of the country.

Thank you,

Team DGA
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the DGA email list, [click here](https://www.pages02.net/democraticgovernorsassoc/unsubscribe/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=15118797&spUserID=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&spJobID=MTg0MDY5NTA3NgS2&spReportId=MTg0MDY5NTA3NQS2). | | Paid for by Democratic Governors Association.

body:

|

| | Poll: Joni Ernst's approval rating drops by double digits
_-Des Moines Register_ [_**Chip in now to help us keep the pressure on, and to keep Mike surging forward >> **_](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24fc/33365068/4a6bbc96/3f8be840/96218135/VEsH/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf_poll_03?amount=10&refcode=FRA_202003011_poll_em_fr_all_L1") That's right, folks, we can win this. Senator Joni Ernst's approval ratings have taken a ten-point drop. Maybe it's her unconditional embrace of President Trump, or could it be her votes to cut Iowan's health care coverage. We could go on, but suffice to say, there's a lot that Iowans want to change about their leadership. But this poll tells us even more. Democrats approve of Admiral Mike by a massive 26 points. That's why we're working so hard for him. He's a proven, combat-tested leader who can unite our state and bring the interests of Iowans -- not of special interests or corporations -- to the forefront of debate in Washington. We can win, team. But we have to keep up the momentum and make sure every Iowan knows what the admiral can do for them. [_**So, as you can, click here and make a donation to help us unite Iowans and beat Joni Ernst in November.**_](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24fc/33365068/4a6bbc96/3f8be841/96218135/VEsE/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf_poll_03?amount=10&refcode=FRA_20200311_poll_em_fr_all_L2") | [DONATE >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24fc/33365068/4a6bbc96/3f8be842/96218135/VEsF/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf_poll_03?amount=10&refcode=FRA_20200311_poll_em_fr_all_btn")

Team Franken

name: =?utf-8?B?TGluZGEgU8OhbmNoZXo=?=
subject: 🛑cuts to Medicare
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sánchez
body:
_****_
**Somehow our President can justify giving billionaires tax breaks one year while slashing Medicare and Medicaid funding the next. **
In his 2021 budget proposal, President Trump is suggesting we cut national spending on vital safety net programs like Medicaid and the Affordable Care Act _**by over $1 trillion**_. This is _on top _of cuts to Medicare and Social Security.
**That 's why I'm asking you to join me in supporting a petition to halt these cuts. [Will you join me in defending Medicare and Medicaid?](https://act.myngp.com/el/EPsAW1Xc65tRMC35u-D4X0p91qg66geXlJ_4duBbmLI=/PRcjz6LF3NxqqOuxGv4Yw_oQd_glduRecLMfWpsCC8A=)**
_**[](https://act.myngp.com/el/EPsAW1Xc65tRMC35u-D4X0p91qg66geXlJ_4duBbmLI=/PRcjz6LF3NxqqOuxGv4Yw_oQd_glduRecLMfWpsCC8A=)**_
Without essential programs like Medicare and Medicaid, millions of lives would automatically be put at risk. Defunding these programs while giving tax breaks to the ultra-wealthy is _unconscionable_.
Let's send a message to President Trump: _Don 't touch Medicare and Medicaid funding. _
[**Help me defend our country 's safety net programs | SIGN ON>>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/EPsAW1Xc65tRMC35u-D4X0p91qg66geXlJ_4duBbmLI=/PRcjz6LF3NxqqOuxGv4Yw_oQd_glduRecLMfWpsCC8A=)

Thank you for taking action,
\-- _Linda S anchez_

body:
This week, I added my name to the growing list of Republicans that are endorsing Justice David Overstreet in the race for Illinois 5th District Suprem Dear Friend, This week, I added my name to the growing list of Republicans that are endorsing Justice David Overstreet in the race for Illinois 5th District Supreme Court Justice. Justice Overstreet is facing a primary challenge, and he needs your help to win the election on March 17, 2020. David Overstreet is endorsed by the Illinois State Rifle Association, Illinois Citizens for Life, and the Illinois Fraternal Order of Police. I have known David Overstreet as both a Judge and as a person for many years. I count him a friend...and I know he will make a fair, impartial, constitutionally-conservative Supreme Court Justice. Justice Overstreet has earned the designation of Highly Recommended by the Illinois State Bar Association's Evaluations Committee. That designation makes him the best candidate in the race for Supreme Court Justice to replace retiring Justice Lloyd Karmeier and to carry on Karmeier's conservative judicial legacy. I can not stress to you enough how important the race for Supreme Court Justice is - The Democrats are eyeing that seat to take it back from Republican control where it has been since 2005. We can't let that happen! Justice David Overstreet gives Republicans the best chance to hang on to a crucial Supreme Court seat. You can learn more about Justice Overstreet or become involved with his campaign, Overstreet 2020, **by visiting[JusticeOverstreet2020.com](http://links.johnshimkus.com/u/click?_t=e6bcb34fac3d4c5c9e5c126ac7bd2c78&_m=43bc50c011ff4409823e2fec038b5a54&_e=yZwZDXfBDzk9eyDZVNdH_983zluflTYOQIgxmlZiMrRVYTMqSoTnNKclhMcCSl1xfQzjETRLvwo7oUR339lNWlxZgrQvmqMSqvcadq69BX-vWW4JaMmxM9qMG1CMLnIp004VhwBhmzveH4D63LCLzwEbB9rkUf3U1C8dzZeoFW6t8T14ri7FRdvftIxeVbsjiO8Cyh6IYs1RLYuiM4dqYdPsX9iERKCLQIcseXRgGx-kG4n0lqKU-23Z2awypBNwU1hTxcFH_9xamws-DDOwbA%3D%3D) or LIKE and Share Facebook Posts at Overstreet 2020. ** Thank you for your support and remember to VOTE OVERSTREET for SUPREME COURT this TUESDAY March 17, 2020. body:

| | During primetime on Fox Business News, anchor Trish Regan claimed COVID-19 was "another attempt to impeach the President." At the same time on Fox News, Tucker Carlson referred to the outbreak as the "Chinese Coronavirus." We're in a crisis and the best Fox News has to offer is lies and bigotry. It's unacceptable. **It's dangerous to be spreading these kinds of lies at a time of panic and crisis. Join us in telling Fox News we've had enough of their lies, fear-mongering, and racism:** [Sign Now](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/3639006a/55b66746/230df613/80e3acd/2949888343/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.kennedyforma.com/petition/no-covid-lies/e/#firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&subsource=pet-2020-03-no-covid-lies-email") When our country can't rely on the White House for factual information, they should at least be able to rely on the news to provide the truth. subject: Oh no
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
|
#
**The situation:** President Donald Trump is coming to Colorado on Friday to attack our campaign and host a lavish fundraiser for our Republican opponent, Senator Cory Gardner. **Why this matters:** Trump will likely use this trip to falsely attack our campaign and the hundreds of thousands of dollars he raises will be used on attack ads to tear down John Hickenlooper. **Our job** : Raise as much money as possible from grassroots supporters like you to ensure we have enough resources to fight back against Trump's attacks on John Hickenlooper. **The ask:** Our donations have slowed this week, and we're really concerned we may fall short of our $250,000 online goal. This is one of the most important moments of our campaign, so we're asking: **Can John Hickenlooper count on you to make a contribution of $10 or more before Trump comes to Colorado this week to campaign for our Republican opponent? name: Tina Smith
subject: Hi there! Coffee?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
Hi there — Next week, I will be sitting down with my team to go over our priorities and strategy for the coming months. But before we do, I wanted to check in with you because it’s important to me that I get your feedback too. While my opponent is busy begging for Donald Trump’s help to win this election, my top priority is making sure this campaign is about you and fighting for your interests in Washington. I wish I could sit down and grab a coffee with each and every one of you to hear what’s on your mind, but the next-best way for me to know is by emailing you a few short questions directly. **[Will you take a minute to let me know what issues matter most to you in this race? I want to know what your priorities are and what keeps you up at night, so I really hope you’ll take a moment to fill out my survey today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15983100/169255307/647991678?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YTg3NGJlMS1mNDYzLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xxrhaT_pkYkcSE0j7EVM5XlsRVF9Rhp5wje4NdcvKgk=&emci=79874be1-f463-ea11-a94c-00155d03b5dd&emdi=7a874be1-f463-ea11-a94c-00155d03b5dd&ceid=6227932)** | [TAKE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15983101/169255308/647991678?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YTg3NGJlMS1mNDYzLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xxrhaT_pkYkcSE0j7EVM5XlsRVF9Rhp5wje4NdcvKgk=&emci=79874be1-f463-ea11-a94c-00155d03b5dd&emdi=7a874be1-f463-ea11-a94c-00155d03b5dd&ceid=6227932)
---
When I first moved to Minnesota in 1984, I met people from all walks of life with different opinions about pretty much everything, but people knew how to listen to each other. Even if they disagreed, folks were willing to respect each others' opinions.
Too often, our leaders in Washington don’t have the same penchant for listening as Minnesotans do. That’s just not how I do things.
I believe we must listen to each other and work hand in hand if we intend to take back the Senate and keep Minnesota from flipping red. But the only way we’ll win is if we set our priorities _together_ and follow through on them _together._
**[So, add your voice today and help me do a better job of answering to folks like you during this election. clean_body: | Hi there — Next week, I will be sitting down with my team to go over our priorities and strategy for the coming months. But before we do, I wanted to check in with you because it’s important to me that I get your feedback too. While my opponent is busy begging for Donald Trump’s help to win this election, my top priority is making sure this campaign is about you and fighting for your interests in Washington. I wish I could sit down and grab a coffee with each and every one of you to hear what’s on your mind, but the next-best way for me to know is by emailing you a few short questions directly. | When I first moved to Minnesota in 1984, I met people from all walks of life with different opinions about pretty much everything, but people knew how to listen to each other. Even if they disagreed, folks were willing to respect each others' opinions. Too often, our leaders in Washington don’t have the same penchant for listening as Minnesotans do. That’s just not how I do things. I believe we must listen to each other and work hand in hand if we intend to take back the Senate and keep Minnesota from flipping red. But the only way we’ll win is if we set our priorities together and follow through on them together. Thanks for weighing in, I’ll be in touch soon. — Tina Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota Tina Smith for Minnesota PO Box 14362 St. Paul, MN 55114 United States Contributions or gifts to Tina Smith for Minnesota are not tax-deductible.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Hirsh=20Singh?=
subject: Three more powerful Ocean County officials have endorsed me for U.S. Senate!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SINGH FOR SENATE
body:
We're building up some serious momentum, Friend. Are you ready to help me Keep America Great? | | | Dear Friend,

I can't wait for November to roll around. We've built up some serious momentum together.

**Cory Booker had better start packing his bags — all the top elected officials in Ocean County just endorsed me!**

As always, I wanted you to be among the first to hear the good news.

My team's press release is below; give it a look and remember:
**2020 isn't just a Republican year. It's the beginning of a Republican _decade_ for New Jersey!**

Sincerely,
Hirsh

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
---
| | [ ](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=5cc4b1897d&e=3e017fab0f)
---
|
---
| March 11th, 2020
**FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
Contact: [press@hirshsingh.com](mailto:press@hirshsingh.com?subject=RE%3A%2011-09-19%20Press%20Release)
---
| |
# Ocean County Freeholder Board, Sheriff, and County Clerk Endorse Hirsh Singh for U.S. Senate

**Linwood, NJ** – Hirsh Singh, Republican candidate for U.S. Senate in New Jersey, today received the endorsement of every Ocean County Freeholder comprised of Freeholder Chairman John Kelly, Freeholder and RNC Committeewoman Ginny Haines, Freeholder Joseph Vicari, Freeholder Gerry Little, Freeholder Gary Quinn, Ocean County Sheriff Michael Mastronardy, and Ocean County Clerk Scott Colabella.

“Singh is the future of the Republican Party,” said Freeholder Haines. “The whole Freeholder Board has watched him work tirelessly to earn our endorsement and he is dedicated to helping the people of New Jersey,” said Freeholder Chairman Kelly.

“Singh is our only chance to beat Cory Booker and understands the real needs that affect our county from ensuring we take care of our senior citizens to ensuring the county has the resources needed to maintain and develop our infrastructure.

Ocean County has some of the strongest economic growth indicators in the state and needs an advocate to ensure our infrastructure is appropriately upgraded and invested in,” said Freeholder Vicari. “Singh’s youth and advocacy for good conservative government makes him a natural leader. He is an asset to New Jersey and a testament of our strong education system. We look forward to fully supporting him in winning the nomination and replacing Cory Booker as our U.S. Senator,” said Sheriff Mastronardy.

“Singh has been to almost every significant event in Ocean County and has been dedicated to our organization for years, I am proud to endorse and support him,” said County Clerk Colabella.

“The support of all these leaders I have known and respected for years is truly humbling,” said Singh. “I am dedicated to win for them and the citizens of New Jersey that are feeling more and more that this state has become simply unaffordable.”

Singh has already been endorsed by RNC Committeeman Bill Palatucci, Ocean County Republican Organization Chairman Frank Holman, Ocean County Republican Organization Vice Chairwoman Barbara Lanuto, State Committeewoman Janice Fields, Atlantic County’s Linwood Republican Club, the Conservative Party of New Jersey, and Bergen County’s and New Jersey’s youngest County Committeeman Michael Schnoll. ###
---
| For any inquiries, please reply to this message or send an email to: [press@hirshsingh.com](mailto:press@hirshsingh.com?subject=RE%3A%2011-09-19%20Press%20Release)

Additional information is available on our [official website](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=bd55485e61&e=3e017fab0f) and [Facebook](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=63a28bce58&e=3e017fab0f) page.

Thank you,
**The Singh for Senate Press Team**
_For the People_

body:

| | Peter --

The date for the special election run-off has been set: **Tuesday, May 12th**.

| [](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b827/29776869/afa481f/569f95dd/1826342060/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDAzMTFfOXdlZWtzLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2003_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200311_9weeks-full")
---

That's just 9 weeks away -- which means we have just 9 weeks to show voters across our district why Christy Smith is the best person in this race to represent us in Congress.

**[So, we were wondering if you could make a weekly contribution -- $5 or $10 every week from now through the election will go a long way for us.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b827/29776869/afa481f/569f95de/1826342060/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDAzMTFfOXdlZWtzLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2003_email_christysmith_weekly?refcode=em20_200311_9weeks-full&recurring=true")**

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
[Donate $5 Weekly](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b827/29776869/afa481f/569f95df/1826342060/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDAzMTFfOXdlZWtzLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2003_email_christysmith_weekly?refcode=em20_200311_9weeks-full&express_lane=true&amount=5&recurring=true") | [Donate $25 Weekly](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b827/29776869/afa481f/569f95d8/1826342060/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDAzMTFfOXdlZWtzLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2003_email_christysmith_weekly?refcode=em20_200311_9weeks-full&express_lane=true&amount=25&recurring=true")
---|---

[Donate $250 Weekly](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b827/29776869/afa481f/569f95db/1826342060/VEsB/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDAzMTFfOXdlZWtzLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2003_email_christysmith_weekly?refcode=em20_200311_9weeks-full&express_lane=true&amount=250&recurring=true") | [Donate Other Amount](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b827/29776869/afa481f/569f95de/1826342060/VEsO/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDAzMTFfOXdlZWtzLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2003_email_christysmith_weekly?refcode=em20_200311_9weeks-full&recurring=true")
Not able to make a weekly donation? No problem, use this link to make a one-time contribution: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2003_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200311_9weeks-full](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b827/29776869/afa481f/569f95dd/1826342060/VEsP/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDAzMTFfOXdlZWtzLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2003_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200311_9weeks-full")

This election is about what people hope for in the future. Mike Garcia believes in bolstering big business, cutting health care access, and following the policy demands of his special interest donors.

Christy represents the opposite: She believes in standing with our working families who deserve access to affordable health care. She knows the value of small businesses in our community and will work to make sure they succeed. She understands that getting big money out of politics and reversing the _Citizens United_ decision is the best way for us to restore our democracy. And that's why we're not taking money from lobbyists or corporate PACs.

The choice is clear: The best candidate is Christy, but we need to make sure we get our ads on the air and our volunteers out knocking doors.

**We can't do that without your help, Peter.**

**[Can you make a weekly contribution to our campaign today? Your donation now will sustain this campaign through our Election Day on May 12th.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b827/29776869/afa481f/569f95de/1826342060/VEsHBQ/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDAzMTFfOXdlZWtzLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2003_email_christysmith_weekly?refcode=em20_200311_9weeks-full&recurring=true")**

Thank you for helping out!

\-- Brandon

Campaign Manager

subject: Watch live: President Trump addresses the nation
body:
Tonight at 9 p.m. ET, President Donald J. Trump will address Americans from the Oval Office about our country’s fight against the... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=517de5f516&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • March 11, 2020
---
| | |
# **Watch live: President Trump addresses the nation**

**Tonight at 9 p.m. ET,** President Donald J. Trump will address Americans from the Oval Office about our country’s fight against the global Coronavirus outbreak.

**🎬** [WATCH LIVE at 9 p.m. ET: President Trump addresses the nation](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3665a895c6&e=3ee4985eea)

**Earlier today,** the President met with financial leaders at the White House, discussing how best to meet the needs of customers affected by the Coronavirus. Ensuring financial relief for both consumers and small businesses is a core piece of the President’s agenda.

**The President** also signed a memorandum today directing his Cabinet to make general-use face masks available to healthcare workers. Under President Trump’s leadership, the Secretary of Health and Human Services has also already taken bold steps to incentivize the development of vaccines, therapeutics, and other products that are needed to fight the Coronavirus outbreak and address supply concerns.

[Stay prepared: Follow CDC for resources and updates on the Coronavirus ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0d0831311b&e=3ee4985eea)

**MORE:** [“Trump Administration Addresses ‘Community Spread’ of Coronavirus”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9fb54c49c3&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **President Trump awards American hero, Gen. Jack Keane, the Medal of Freedom **

**The Medal of Freedom** is reserved for individuals who have made outsized contributions to our society—or, in some cases, to our national security. Yesterday, President Trump bestowed that honor upon retired 4-star General Jack Keane.

**“It is my great privilege** to present our nation’s highest civilian honor, the Presidential Medal of Freedom, to a courageous warrior and fearless patriot,” [the President said](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f80b9e8291&e=3ee4985eea) from the East Room of the White House.

**🎬****Gen. Keane:** [“Mr. President, thank you for the Trump defense buildup”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7bf1b0c58e&e=3ee4985eea)

**Gen. Keane’s storied** military career began in Vietnam, where he joined the legendary 101st Airborne Division of the U.S. Army, also called the “Screaming Eagles.” He showed unflinching courage and exceptional valor early on, earning him a Silver Star.

**The next stage** in Gen. Keane’s service was helping to rebuild American military might. Thanks to his state-of-the-art training program, our country was ready when duty called.

**When America was attacked** on September 11, 2001, Keane was serving as Vice Chief of Staff for the Army—and sitting in his Pentagon office when terrorists struck the building. Running through smoke and debris, he helped evacuate the injured, saving numerous lives in the process.

**In the years since,** Gen. Keane has continued to make America’s national security interests his top priority, offering counsel and guiding the next generation of defense leaders. President Trump called him a visionary, a brilliant strategist, and an American hero.

**“I have to say,”** the President noted, that Keane “has given me a lot of good advice, too.”

🇺🇸 [WATCH: President Trump present the Medal of Freedom to Gen. Keane](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=929b115fe8&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
