name: Holcomb Crew
subject: One Indiana: Best basketball moments in Indiana history
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
It’s March Madness and Eric wanted to talk about his favorite subject- Indiana basketball. [ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=712b342aa3254ef4934ee1b7f38d4b62&_e=CZJSGL5rLgnnr2n_mOT1ifRL8egujfOeBlLTX4dEBi0tiB9XZgW8Hils86NNy81GT4sIJ77Ki5J0SKHVTdw2CefuqzHJ6yRraUXLPtapkkXRF0APQ9jJdnFWIRXpPl4HZa_mmK0REF8-sO6uuxBbIdChiKKflwCMd_FipvxVZBoJKkvr0MiwLAZkQ8HdMxYukwjIXEEawzsWhxW-hrcF3IOGV4V4TaVcJRXwdslkdB-ZPU2lV4xuNTtfVRuze3aW5J8eloOD4BBM00F0Mul8BUGGzchwX-EG2zko6YpxZB5xF3vjS6mkMPzpjyFqL77WoxGE8WUW-YJ8V6Xntphp-62PI1vXW-3hYWXfOHDnzMqB44FbVIkVMwLRz8o7EMbBgnVDfxDKkDlsjfz0wxfqaptL67rpxZ4cAAaOSBNhjvo%3D) Friend,

**We love basketball — especially Eric. **
It’s in our DNA and we know that Hoosiers around the state live, eat, breathe, and dream basketball. Since March Madness is right around the corner, Eric wanted to share some of his favorite moments in Hoosier hoops history. Check out his list below. [ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=712b342aa3254ef4934ee1b7f38d4b62&_e=CZJSGL5rLgnnr2n_mOT1ifRL8egujfOeBlLTX4dEBi0tiB9XZgW8Hils86NNy81GT4sIJ77Ki5J0SKHVTdw2CefuqzHJ6yRraUXLPtapkkXRF0APQ9jJdnFWIRXpPl4HZa_mmK0REF8-sO6uuxBbIdChiKKflwCMd_FipvxVZBoJKkvr0MiwLAZkQ8HdMxYukwjIXEEawzsWhxW-hrcF3CV6YcPQ8ZhKE8C1PX_naYMqvj86ZUSHMdVBYNZiefbBq7t5IiKzpS_qWZKNMIFE0ntZyCi0gS-TBRFhlV9oA4b2bHgfTsW4LICvFXQRlETk8VR9TeR2l0rXW6zOU7m9tLXSTazYz-7Ay7BXmyZ2jFBDYytAj9T3_l0cdy3-YN6P_MrHg9q9HtkkIsxiSRHCLrXliXjhNZfBh2SifKEVv1E%3D)
* **Milan Miracle, 1954** \- The greatest upset in the history of sports and the inspiration for the greatest sports movie of all time, Hoosiers.
* **IU vs. Syracuse, 1987** \- Keith Smart sealing Indiana University’s fifth national championship is burned into our memory — **[relive this iconic Hoosier basketball moment.](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=712b342aa3254ef4934ee1b7f38d4b62&_e=CZJSGL5rLgnnr2n_mOT1id7JukdCET2Gdhj7U4KowkVlWCQUlM9ovexH6eruh5gcoD5TotBayj9ZTkhvhVMUritIWjrol9p4RNdMjCDio-L0v1hMDcklqoNqSUk7ryhsuIlEpA7BfrauwLjm3i5g3hxy4KdeM55KbhtZ6dea2zmdIRh1YPj_M011Z4RBlur6MNNrvzFsWMPSMQEGVgVwzGpWn86Tj1EhO3oAI8Z8yRoULqY6YTJUaI4ByAi3_rp5eY1Dyq8PyKTgL1mCEWGjfhr6t7P7qG6_Ev8Cl2vy72OkCpe9pMmFxBYw44trLj4Od3b58WSgAs5KksvweKcMqnHlOlTv483rJJ-KMLQI4IHo3kafXij2MowjvNb-NYHJcAhbm-NjRwtXZvWLmvCB6TQZzw_2tj5aH_bspqJG0Ng%3D)**
* **Notre Dame Women’s 2018 National Championship Run** \- What’s better than one buzzer-beater in the Final Four? **[How about two.
](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=712b342aa3254ef4934ee1b7f38d4b62&_e=CZJSGL5rLgnnr2n_mOT1id7JukdCET2Gdhj7U4KowkUe5KIe9AQ72h-U7oFxDueb8BtUW5nKL9xOPwfhGQYiWmXxY3nY0woW7KOgjwSW2OWzY4bk7lJxovxm2OEjyWJ4cbU5u0SrQ5fXd71BB_onIuc1ZVpgih7_gUQB9Y2Rf3cT0odEgVY5hWbuJfuJ7ckcYNrNBTDZYjYB4TR8mQCYJFrjrbWZbvLenG1yAnI29EoYVxYOLOfskufO1UEE2lwati79WZ-W-0lhBiVhj9HiD3fzvmU5Ru0dPbjKifdNkrksC-mxUubqGDG1jkpMJPvFdnSlGiENMV3HN1oQgjM4f24DUhli9_fbNR63mr1bAfn65QX-bMdMhJ5u90-n_6OVwGKY-QI1JATEHka4_uYa3gDODk3qU-0pEtYi5ZWqOcY%3D)**
* **IU over #1 Kentucky, 2011 -** Every Hoosiers fan knows where they were when the **[‘Wat Shot’](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=712b342aa3254ef4934ee1b7f38d4b62&_e=CZJSGL5rLgnnr2n_mOT1id7JukdCET2Gdhj7U4KowkUe19SRp44GSKH4TaxTwof8Uf-u_RFd6DrhdDt9UxMd2nfRUIU_TD35eez1HBNj-u1iZIxTF9nkgmw9UB2GlwJV4Wnr61l8AUD-jk0fq4NbpRkesKNrB1WOgGn0QYAhK-Oy0o3OLDI8vmKGeCmE8q_KVLHHhDozU2yUmL_OqFeGhd_WXgSJC3tyMyWAm3fHp8SoQUNPVVncpt6pz7KkHgbDaO2xhp-YROFEHzhz4iNabQp91nx6KIBe8l1Sp3X5O_4Mes3pALIo24y7l60c1Pxq2XHJIalII_OSc3Nis1tFDtc1GpjPkRxRblfZh5SJJQyJjN61weBMJdSRpSGm8qLUvpF-bHitFnVGJdn6lbUisOFms0enGvmGmBjwLFZU4z0%3D) **happened.
* **Any Crispus Attucks High School Game from 1954-1956 -** Every single high school game that Oscar Robertson played in should be part of this list.
* **1982 High School Championship** \- In this instant classic, Scott Skiles scored 39 to lead Plymouth over Gary Roosevelt in double overtime.
* **1990 High School Championship** \- Damon Bailey led Bedford North Lawrence to the title in front of 41,000 at the Hoosier Dome, the largest crowd to EVER watch a high school basketball game. **[Watch it here.](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=712b342aa3254ef4934ee1b7f38d4b62&_e=CZJSGL5rLgnnr2n_mOT1id7JukdCET2Gdhj7U4KowkWMFyvB-hKn385ectObPJt5SSt5UmyBbieINFXQUkWNUIU5VapDiYtSfrK5b1eQTPYgE-dx2MfIr1YUQukanIwabfCOyaOWlmMoT4JzN-4PfEItdmsYeg9Bobg8iF81EFLbsa346SqtIQqNpl-Ix61Vu9hsDM8YSOyVawHS8c4ybXq7Bkwlh3h2flfx5kDIoE7Qu_a2MdxNapuL8QS8yV8HPJVOBlZhAYdPn9CTvU8-Z1fuDVnwlGG93EL2T5CdivVUFDwnhPj_V1bYdZf9jdkKPraG79lWC_gEzIRTykdcEuD7RiHmYQUuDu2rSWGmBXu8qzJ1oaPsYzS8Of_ivV6SSqBUMuQ6tu4w174AXQf8AXE2Cb7U7Q7OpAovHwNhTk8%3D)**
* **All three of Pike High School’s state championships (1998, 2001, 2003) -** these aren’t as well known as the other games on our list, but they hit home for Eric (it’s his alma mater!).
* **Reggie Miller scores 8 points in 9 seconds against the Knicks, 1995** \- This is one of the most exciting sequences you’ll ever see in any sport. **[Watch Reggie do his thing and create an iconic moment in Pacers history.](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=712b342aa3254ef4934ee1b7f38d4b62&_e=CZJSGL5rLgnnr2n_mOT1id7JukdCET2Gdhj7U4KowkWaq2Vc09t0xckZT9LPVusW_tbdnFVMwCQ5UMO5FYRSYva5I9POHQXDPQs-GFktZtl68Blb5G-4W1Lwv3MqWl0um7WNoMVGoffx4VduIHcUTn_68CJ4ualLDm2MF-3WqfYQ2hht1PUNn7vLlhIXRABkq37lB1eqkMeDYmHYRcHrCkObC38x2VH3ptyPmwoqmhMSQavGhKy_EjxuDy8MLF8tLaRzXn12f54uql6M3tCyAkpp3AB2P0APd1Y5tCOn0ihs_DQ3mbgWfpdJRQer4AXrsHMAH4_8sKSpNZqiAAMt0YKLusOk_kIJM2aSle1-Vo1e0NpG1P5Z4HJNUwHzFZ7CYqBAVd5T4p1jPF2zql9COIB9lMBVmnfnZ1gr_ZuzJvE%3D)**
* **Bryce Drew’s Buzzer Beater -** “The Shot” sends #13 Valpo over #4 Mississippi in one of **[the most memorable buzzer beaters in NCAA history.](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=712b342aa3254ef4934ee1b7f38d4b62&_e=CZJSGL5rLgnnr2n_mOT1id7JukdCET2Gdhj7U4KowkUJJkSi-ls5sBeZeO3jsParFZkeEizi3t_MxozFa6jRjeNuAnEv2Ovtn9gU4folQn1TBNRQZq7DPNZ6tMyIAx3tVD4OiMYYQEVWbvzLCXm81K0Y_U0waCEWrT5XRDsAKGbl8NoKQi1PfF76lOTkmkZjgziLRZL4fgDKfIg5N-83NtGXlVxb4ElWMzV9sVhLH40nO56uAqlHRilCJHJtb8ADDXoetAVgn8e6KYA35EDijda20X8sloRSUAbZAimOHx7TMm22xZm9jzRPFT3hMydgvoaupa4pZQ5FvDDhsqIsnDpfmP2VkPyb72wPvlt8hQVLILKt2WzO6CKYaI26hojdCiBuFD_dx_iraFFme1SX8U9ACsxmAH_ogQTnNOcAXbs%3D)**
* **Purdue Women 1999 National Championship run** \- this run captured the magic of Boilermaker basketball and electrified a fan base.
* **Butler University’s Back-to-Back National Title Games (2009 & 2010)** \- **[Eric still thinks that Gordon Hayward’s half-court shot is gonna go in...](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=712b342aa3254ef4934ee1b7f38d4b62&_e=CZJSGL5rLgnnr2n_mOT1id7JukdCET2Gdhj7U4KowkW01OSqrlbdYc6HQcCeBqTzkn85g9pe9NdAOJLMm0WhwZCZINZsFEhroU27DwT7xozJu1MCkr8sNPCIkf0hDbcmTr4-fUaCggL7efWRj_3ez-Sjm4Uvk9-KM3f20OrfpmDA2biQFO7G7tFr2j_IW01Xy6fv0Sy0lmpe7Pfm46SXqwf84J9j63hmPkbzNW3f2tC2Ku-6ojDRUVoIAQa9MJGFtkfY6Zbw3IJw1yLpFtplYuvSBILzqCXDuJE2pY5RcTNZQ3nTpWIvo9B_MhBJynmZ6jl5S9y0C8Pkt8Zc4lp55VlqO_UexnCeQrl-f_02jl-ODWNEiM7Cnss1Qrrgc_1Tpb-iORb8B9MIH02X9m69FH10qWx15NikTjtZZWclJ8s%3D)**

**Flash Survey** **Q: What's your favorite Indiana basketball moment of all time?** [ **Let us know!** ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=712b342aa3254ef4934ee1b7f38d4b62&_e=CZJSGL5rLgnnr2n_mOT1ifRL8egujfOeBlLTX4dEBi0tiB9XZgW8Hils86NNy81GT4sIJ77Ki5J0SKHVTdw2CefuqzHJ6yRraUXLPtapkkXRF0APQ9jJdnFWIRXpPl4HZa_mmK0REF8-sO6uuxBbIdChiKKflwCMd_FipvxVZBoJKkvr0MiwLAZkQ8HdMxYukwjIXEEawzsWhxW-hrcF3LVkbtHLJ0oPMwnlPB09VdDPy-DP6K_Wd67GT5m6PmYZqLcK5xYLDHWst5KE9Ggy3CerR4UwnGUUaqzXGe3zvgu3-G5arSpRRaJxHu3ddaLuBNBbuWC0X6xRn0m21CzJ-laR6J7kF_uIsXSTgQxJ5RueERWu4UDFwV582nEN3h9A3VMUOpGHxzCcyHlKV8C7v-a51eeMfbcdAlsQ6Ja74Ms%3D) **That’s our list for this week!** We hope that you enjoyed reliving Eric’s favorite Indiana hoops memories and we look forward to seeing what you have to share. Thanks,
-Holcomb Crew |

clean_body: It’s March Madness and Eric wanted to talk about his favorite subject- Indiana basketball. Friend, We love basketball — especially Eric. It’s in our DNA and we know that Hoosiers around the state live, eat, breathe, and dream basketball. Since March Madness is right around the corner, Eric wanted to share some of his favorite moments in Hoosier hoops history. Check out his list below. Milan Miracle, 1954 \- The greatest upset in the history of sports and the inspiration for the greatest sports movie of all time, Hoosiers. IU vs. Syracuse, 1987 \- Keith Smart sealing Indiana University’s fifth national championship is burned into our memory — Notre Dame Women’s 2018 National Championship Run \- What’s better than one buzzer-beater in the Final Four? IU over #1 Kentucky, 2011 - Every Hoosiers fan knows where they were when the happened. Any Crispus Attucks High School Game from 1954-1956 - Every single high school game that Oscar Robertson played in should be part of this list. 1982 High School Championship \- In this instant classic, Scott Skiles scored 39 to lead Plymouth over Gary Roosevelt in double overtime. 1990 High School Championship \- Damon Bailey led Bedford North Lawrence to the title in front of 41,000 at the Hoosier Dome, the largest crowd to EVER watch a high school basketball game. All three of Pike High School’s state championships (1998, 2001, 2003) - these aren’t as well known as the other games on our list, but they hit home for Eric (it’s his alma mater!). Reggie Miller scores 8 points in 9 seconds against the Knicks, 1995 \- This is one of the most exciting sequences you’ll ever see in any sport. Bryce Drew’s Buzzer Beater - “The Shot” sends #13 Valpo over #4 Mississippi in one of Purdue Women 1999 National Championship run \- this run captured the magic of Boilermaker basketball and electrified a fan base. Butler University’s Back-to-Back National Title Games (2009 & 2010) \- Flash Survey Q: What's your favorite Indiana basketball moment of all time? That’s our list for this week! We hope that you enjoyed reliving Eric’s favorite Indiana hoops memories and we look forward to seeing what you have to share. Thanks, -Holcomb Crew | | | | | | Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana. © Copyright 2020. All rights reserved. | | Eric Holcomb for Indiana, 101 W Ohio Street, Suite 2200, Indianapolis, IN 46204 | (317) 569-0709 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

body:
Across Congressional District 5, folks will get a chance to watch our first-ever campaign ad. Across Congressional District 5, folks will get a chance to watch our first-ever campaign ad. Needless to say, I am excited, but I want to make sure you have a chance to see and hear about it directly from me. _**Check out our first ad by clicking the image below!**_ [ ](http://links.oklahomaforhill.com/u/click?_t=3f8f472f46d84bffaa7cbc7593ac1005&_m=4fd3465c4ec147a29e57d507fd3e765f&_e=2xHUTXaL5uKE8wolqUFHQKobMNgJpRALXfd85Nam70ygzKRTCdo8ZhrsthBFVUGH9JvUkGPrI1ESye2r7vXoiOEgUmF59LkrvuuQ3BoKVhAMRrnyNNOopuua2Ehen2RNvHpIstsOECUmNda7EYRPhqniRrCl8pZXK9Ppt6pzZosTTSsxwh2XHHX_6m8lk_ApuocHlp2Ksj0WRiMixaCCjMe9PjhH7FPLPCdragPbH_8NFFKBdWjvF6mhjnvdJlWYRDYzXJC9i0ZiHB93Mdm0taiD5N9t6IxTuEFf4ysHt_9w8rGDaQJn2EkLf4Csgoi2-FFve8r1gG-QGnRNnB9ga36eZueEcaKFTdaUldQrfS8E9bukJTVOSEwra9iNhTpfp3xXoe7wPoCAgdXbS_d8rDobcjfaFBAR4N42mPNzP0A%3D) The theme of our ad shares the motto and focus of our campaign: “Fix Congress.” It highlights how my experience as a family man, businessman, and man of faith will work to solve the same problems politicians can’t seem to figure out in Washington. For one thing, Congress needs people who can solve complex problems and create jobs to maintain the upward trajectory of our economy. As the CEO of the nation’s leading manufacturer of over 6,000 parts for classic cars and trucks, I have years of experience working to achieve these same goals daily. I’m excited to show Oklahomans that they don’t have to keep sending the same politicians to Washington only to get the same results. As I state in my video, President Trump is fighting the good fight, but he needs allies in Congress. Kendra Horn turned her back on Oklahoma her first day in office, when she voted for Nancy Pelosi as Speaker, and then she voted for the sham impeachment. When elected to Congress, I will promote Oklahoma, not liberal, values. _Please_ help us make sure everyone sees this video. Share it with your friends on Facebook, and be sure to forward this email along to all of your contacts in CD-5. And if you can, please consider giving $10 to help our team get this message out and to keep our momentum building throughout the early primaries and beyond! name: Scott Fitzgerald
subject: You're Invited!
body:
Brookfield, Delafield, West Bend, Madison No images? [Click here](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-e-nhrkdn-ahkdjtlkr-m/) [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-nhrkdn-ahkdjtlkr-r/) Peter,As our campaign for Congress continues to gain steam, I'd like to invite you to join me at a few upcoming events. Even if you can't make it in person _(and I hope you can -- they'll be a lot of fun),_ you can still support us by clicking on the link below the event itself.Thanks - I'll see you there!
### **Wednesday, March 11th - West Bend, WI **
* Join us for a **St. Patrick 's Day Fundraising Reception** for Scott Fitzgerald for Congress!
* Special Guests: Senator Alberta Darling and Senator Duey Stroebel

[RSVP - West Bend St. Patrick's Day Event](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-nhrkdn-ahkdjtlkr-y/) [Donate - West Bend St. Patrick's Day Event](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-nhrkdn-ahkdjtlkr-j/)
### **Thursday, March 12th - Madison, WI **
* Join us for the **Third Annual St. Patrick 's Day Fundraiser** for Scott Fitzgerald!

[RSVP - Madison St. Patrick's Day Event](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-nhrkdn-ahkdjtlkr-t/) [Donate - Madison St. Patrick's Day Event](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-nhrkdn-ahkdjtlkr-i/)
### **Thursday, March 19th - Brookfield, WI **
* Join us at Westmoor Country Club for a fundraiser in support of Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
* Hosts: Candee Arndt, Dr. Paula Crum, Paul & Amy Farrow, Sandy & Mike Harsh, Dr. Chris & Ann Hansen, Robin Moore, Dr. John Moser, and Sen. Leah Vukmir

[RSVP - Brookfield Event](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-nhrkdn-ahkdjtlkr-d/) [Donate - Brookfield Event](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-nhrkdn-ahkdjtlkr-u/)
### **Thursday, April 16th - Delafield, WI **
* Join us at the Delafield Hotel for a fundraiser in support of Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
* Special Guest: Governor Scott Walker

[RSVP - Walker Event in Delafield](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-nhrkdn-ahkdjtlkr-o/) [Donate - Walker Event in Brookfield](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-nhrkdn-ahkdjtlkr-b/) Thanks again!Scott FitzgeraldP.S. Even if you can't make it in person, I hope you'll click the "Donate" link below the RSVP to help make the events a success! -Fitz

name: Joe Kennedy III
subject: Important note about COVID-19
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts
body:
| [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390066/55b66746/231437d6/80e390b/3952436966/VEsH/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://www.kennedyforma.com/")
---

| | Hey There is no way to sugarcoat it, things are scary right now. We are having a moment of crisis in this country - of public health and of leadership. **But we will get through it.** This administration's botched handling of the COVID-19 threat, their lies, their misinformation and lack of urgency isn't making this any better. Congress can't stop their scattershot response. But we can step up and provide some clarity, certainty, and relief. We are fighting hard to get our families and communities the support they need -- testing, treatment, supplies for medical professionals on the front lines, and the resources families need to weather this, from nutrition assistance to sick days. We are keeping the most vulnerable front of mind -- the poor, the already sick, the elderly, the uninsured or underinsured -- not just because it's the right thing to do but because it is the only way we will contain a pandemic. And we are committed to providing updated, timely, and accurate information every step of the way. We will stay vigilant. We will stay honest and transparent. We will help you take care of the people you love. We will keep this country safe and repair the damage done. More soon, |
---|---|---

| | Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts.
---|---
| This email was sent by **[Joe Kennedy](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390066/55b66746/231437d6/80e3914/3952436966/VEsE/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.kennedyforma.com/")**.
PO Box 15, Boston, MA 02137.

Email is an important way for Joe Kennedy to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. Too much email?
